repository_inventory.purpose: Process jobs from an HTTP API.

risk_surfaces.title: Caller-controlled retry count
validation_actions: Traced an explicit zero retry value through configuration fallback
risk_surfaces.conclusion: An explicit zero is replaced by the default retry count.

methods: Traced input normalization and inspected edge-case tests

deep_analysis.conclusion: No shared contract with multiple implementations or changed callers exists in the fixture.
The fixture has no bootstrap, middleware, migration, or hook ordering surface.
The fixture contains no catch, fallback, retry, or error-boundary path.
All configuration symbols in the fixture resolve to local definitions.
No concurrent entry point or shared mutable resource exists in the fixture.
The fixture has no serialization, timezone, numeric, or encoding boundary.

methods: Traced explicit zero through the truthiness fallback
deep_analysis.conclusion: The fallback replaces a legitimate zero value.
The fixture defines no health check, metric, alert, or logging contract.
The fixture uses no third-party runtime dependency.
The fixture acquires no persistent connection, listener, timer, or stream.
The fixture has no assertion, schema, or generated-type boundary.
The standalone fixture has no meaningful repository history.

candidates.title: Preserve an explicit zero retry count
candidates.summary: The job runner replaces a caller's zero retry count with the configured default.
candidates.root_cause: The runner uses truthiness instead of a null-only fallback for the retry count.
candidates.affected_workflow: Submitting a job that must not be retried
candidates.impact: Jobs explicitly configured for no retries run three additional attempts, delaying final failure and repeating side effects.

evidence.observation: The expression retries or DEFAULT_RETRIES replaces zero.
Existing tests cover positive retries but not zero.

reproduction.details: Calling run_job(retries=0) selects DEFAULT_RETRIES before dispatch.

counter_evidence_checked: Confirmed zero is allowed by the public request validator and has no later normalization.
verification: Add a regression test asserting run_job(retries=0) performs one attempt only.
acceptance_criteria: An explicit zero retry value is preserved.
The configured default still applies when retries is omitted.

issues.title: Preserve an explicit zero retry count
